sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72959" key="o)liga/delfos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγ-άδελφος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having few brothers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:123:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">123.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
